lyrics_json.text: Woke up
in the car, glass on my shirt.
Neck on fire, can't even turn.
Doctor bills came, rent due tomorrow.
I don't know how I'm gonna pay.
Mama on the phone, I say I'm fine, but my hands shake
so bad I can't hold the line.
They hit me from behind, now I limp when I walk.
Every step hurts, can't even talk.
Can't sleep at night, the pain too loud.
One wrong move and I lose it all.
Time running out, I'm scared as hell.
These bills gon' bury me, I can tell.
I-I got hit hard, now I can't breathe.
Everything hurting, I'm on my knees.
Need help bad, I don't know what to do.
Before these bills take everything from me.
I got hit hard, I got hit hard.
Can't breathe, can't breathe, can't breathe.
Need help bad right now.
Before these bills take it all.
Take it all.
Take it all.
Slipped on wet floor, leg went out fast.
Now I can't work, can't even pick up my son.
Kids keep staring, asking what's wrong with dad.
I smile, but inside I feel like trash.
One bad step, flipped my whole life.
Can't even stand up without wanting to cry.
Scared every morning I'll never get right.
Scared I'll stay broken for the rest of my life.
Hey, if this sound like your life right now, if the pain
won't quit and they dragging it out, you ain't gotta stay stuck,
you ain't gotta break.
Pick up that phone for your own sake.
I got hit hard, now I can't breathe.
Everything hurting, I'm on my knees.
Need help bad, I don't know what to do.
Before these bills take everything from me.
I got hit hard, I got hit hard.
Can't breathe, can't breathe, can't breathe.
Need help bad right now.
Before these bills take it all.
Take it all.
Take it all.

audio_analysis.lyrics_text: Woke up in the car, glass on my shirt. Neck on fire, can't even turn. Doctor bills came, rent due tomorrow. I don't know how I'm gonna pay. Mama on the phone, I say I'm fine, but my hands shake so bad I can't hold the line. They hit me from behind, now I limp when I walk. Every step hurts, can't even talk. Can't sleep at night, the pain too loud. One wrong move and I lose it all. Time running out, I'm scared as hell. These bills gon' bury me, I can tell. I-I got hit hard, now I can't breathe. Everything hurting, I'm on my knees. Need help bad, I don't know what to do. Before these bills take everything from me. I got hit hard, I got hit hard. Can't breathe, can't breathe, can't breathe. Need help bad right now. Before these bills take it all. Take it all. Take it all. Slipped on wet floor, leg went out fast. Now I can't work, can't even pick up my son. Kids keep staring, asking what's wrong with dad. I smile, but inside I feel like trash. One bad step, flipped my whole life. Can't even stand up without wanting to cry. Scared every morning I'll never get right. Scared I'll stay broken for the rest of my life. Hey, if this sound like your life right now, if the pain won't quit and they dragging it out, you ain't gotta stay stuck, you ain't gotta break. Pick up that phone for your own sake. I got hit hard, now I can't breathe. Everything hurting, I'm on my knees. Need help bad, I don't know what to do. Before these bills take everything from me. I got hit hard, I got hit hard. Can't breathe, can't breathe, can't breathe. Need help bad right now. Before these bills take it all. Take it all. Take it all.
audio_analysis.song_description: A gritty rap song detailing the painful aftermath and financial struggle of a severe car accident.
audio_analysis.video_idea: The music video follows a young man struggling through daily tasks while heavily bandaged after a crash. It features dynamic cuts between his painful reality, piling medical bills, and chaotic, slow-motion flashbacks of the accident.
